Container.Name: qbittorrent-port-forward-gluetun-server-configurable-polling-interval
Container.Overview: A shell script and Docker container for automatically setting qBittorrent's listening port from Gluetun's control server, with a configurable polling interval.

Config.Name: QBT_ADDR
Config.Description: HTTP URL for the qBittorrent web UI, with port

Config.Name: GTN_ADDR
Config.Description: HTTP URL for the Gluetun control server, with port

Config.Name: GTN_USERNAME
Config.Description: Username for Gluetun control server basic auth (if enabled)

Config.Name: GTN_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Password for Gluetun control server basic auth (if enabled)

Config.Name: GTN_APIKEY
Config.Description: API key for Gluetun control server API key auth (if enabled)

Config.Name: CRON_INTERVAL
Config.Description: Cron schedule for how often to sync the port (e.g. */30 * * * * for every 30 minutes)
